dependencies.name: qtbase
dependencies.reason: The Experimental notification presentation adapter directly uses system Qt Core. Ubuntu 24.04 CI verifies Qt 6.4.2 as the oldest tested common-API component version; Gentoo 6.11.1 supplies current reference evidence.

dependencies.name: qtdeclarative
dependencies.reason: The Experimental notification card and list module directly use system QML, Qt Quick, and Quick Controls. Ubuntu 24.04 CI verifies Qt 6.4.2 as the oldest tested common-API component version; Gentoo 6.11.1-r1 supplies current reference evidence.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The passive notification presentation adapter deliberately has no X11 dependency; production shell-window linkage remains unimplemented and unmeasured.

unresolved.reason: The Qt adapter and visible synthetic-card QML module are implemented, but the complete shell executable, resolved production theme adapter, and direct and transitive runtime closure still require measurement.
AT-SPI behavior was observed in the spike, but production accessibility linkage and packaging must be measured before declaration.
